_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: Nf1 +/− T cells are more hyperproliferative when stimulated with anti-CD3 than their wild-type counterparts...The skin thickness...was more pronounced in Nf1 +/− mice
details: T cells showed enhanced proliferation when stimulated with anti-CD3 and demonstrated stronger delayed-type hypersensitivity responses with higher activated CD8+ T cell fractions
